edges.reason: Index points agents to the current system map.
Index points agents to living-doc ownership and source-of-truth rules.
Best-practices rubric names the memory graph as orientation metadata.
Best-practices rubric names the living-doc hygiene owner.
Hygiene checker guards living-doc ownership and generated-artifact rules.
Hygiene checker verifies the living reading order links required docs and artifacts.
Generator emits machine-readable graph.
Generator emits human-readable graph.
Markdown is rendered from the JSON graph manifest.
Generator emits the machine-readable remediation handoff ledger.
Generator emits the human-readable remediation handoff ledger.
Markdown is rendered from the JSON handoff ledger.
Best-practices rubric tells agents to read the loop ledger before continuing the 44-point goal.
Completed points require dated worklog evidence anchors.
The loop ledger records status and handoff anchors but not the architecture rubric.
Generator emits the machine-readable generated-artifact governance map.
Generator emits the human-readable generated-artifact governance map.
Markdown is rendered from the JSON generated-artifact governance map.
Governance consumes the shared generated artifact manifest.
Hygiene checker and governance share one generated artifact manifest.
Living-doc hygiene points detailed generated-artifact trust rules to the generated governance map.
Generator emits the machine-readable final closure pack.
Generator emits the human-readable final closure pack.
Markdown is rendered from the JSON closure pack.
Closure pack proves all 44 remediation points are completed.
Closure pack proves generated artifacts are governed and non-runtime except the explicit generated proof artifact.
Closure pack proves the memory graph discovers closure artifacts.
Generator emits the AI commodity isolation contract.
Generator emits the AI commodity isolation Markdown.
Markdown is rendered from the machine-readable isolation contract.
Route parity generator owns the generated route inventory.
Route parity generator owns the machine-readable route mutation inventory.
Generator emits the machine-readable FastAPI route ownership map.
Generator emits the human-readable FastAPI route ownership map.
Markdown is rendered from the JSON backend route ownership map.
Backend map cross-checks FastAPI decorators against route inventory classifications.
API/storage doc points route edits to backend adapter ownership.
Storage ownership generator emits the machine-readable storage map.
Storage ownership generator emits the human-readable storage map.
Storage map reads route inventory store references instead of reparsing routes.
Doc owns the descriptive lifecycle header contract.
API/storage doc maps browser-facing route groups.
API/storage doc names backend-only and mirrored FastAPI endpoints.
Browser-facing writes should pass local operator auth before body parsing.
Backend transport forwards optional backend bridge auth to FastAPI.
Proof doc explains the versioned proof/evidence source contract.
Backend proof predicates load the canonical contract.
Generator emits frontend proof artifact from the JSON contract.
Generator emits human-readable proof invariant table.
Generator reads the test-only proof invariant manifest.
Markdown table is rendered from the invariant case manifest.
Proof owner doc points agents to the invariant matrix.
Frontend proof facade imports generated artifact.
Position evidence UI uses the human proof facade.
Scanner doc explains the versioned creation-safety contract.
Scanner engine implements scan policy and guardrail behavior.
Replay/profit doc maps readback assembly ownership.
Replay service assembles readbacks from replay engine outputs.
Repository doc maps structural repository capability contracts.
Parity doc separates tracked-position and suggested-trade row semantics.
Parity doc separates suggested paper ideas from tracked production rows.
Migration doc owns the versioned migration manifest.
Constraint doc owns DB/API/proof invariant boundaries.
Index doc owns read-path index boundaries.
Local DB doc owns SQLite role classifications.
Storage map points agents to repository ownership docs.
Storage map points agents to local DB hardening docs.
API models doc owns backend mutation adapter boundary.
TypeScript contracts doc owns manual TS request/response shapes.
Response validation checks shallow envelopes named by TS contracts.
Schema bridge generator emits JSON check artifact.
Schema bridge generator emits Markdown check artifact.
Bridge maps manual TypeScript contracts.
Bridge maps narrow Pydantic adapter schemas.
Store/lifecycle registry appears in route parity output.
Strategy Lab route contracts appear in route parity output.
Trading Desk coordinator uses typed tab IDs.
Scanner evidence display is split into a focused component.
Selected-pick record UI is split into a focused component.
Tracked-position surface uses explicit FinTable mobile contract.
Suggested-trade surface uses explicit FinTable mobile contract.
Scanner surface uses explicit FinTable mobile contract.
App shell consumes typed main navigation tabs.
Strategy Lab profile surface lives in BrainTab.
Strategy Lab replay surface lives in OptimizerTab.
AI commodity runner emits latest proof-lane readback.
Isolation contract tells agents when to avoid runner changes.
Isolation contract consumes storage-map classification for AI commodity artifacts.
Isolation contract consumes route inventory to guard browser/API exposure.
AI commodity remains separate from mounted browser product.
Memory graph points to generated route inventory instead of duplicating it.
Memory graph points to machine-readable route mutation inventory instead of duplicating it.
Memory graph points to the generated backend route ownership map instead of duplicating route adapters.
Memory graph points to generated storage ownership map instead of duplicating it.
Memory graph points to generated artifact governance instead of duplicating trust boundaries.
Memory graph points to the 44-point handoff ledger instead of duplicating status.
Memory graph points to the final closure pack instead of duplicating closure validation.
Closure pack proves the loop is closed but the loop map owns per-point status details.
Closure pack proves governance is clean but governance owns generated-artifact trust boundaries.
Memory graph points to storage/API owner docs instead of duplicating inventories.

non_goals: Does not replace generated route inventory.
Does not replace route mutation inventory.
Does not replace storage ownership maps.
Does not replace the remediation loop handoff ledger.
Does not replace generated artifact governance.
Does not replace the final remediation closure pack.
Does not define runtime behavior, route payloads, auth, scanner policy, proof semantics, or DB schema.

playbooks.heading: Start Here
playbooks.summary: Use this path before broad architecture or product-scope work.

playbooks.heading: If Touching Routes/Auth
playbooks.summary: Follow route ownership, auth boundaries, and generated parity before route edits.

playbooks.heading: If Touching Proof/Evidence
playbooks.summary: Proof claims must stay stricter than UI display groups.

playbooks.heading: If Touching Scanner/Creation
playbooks.summary: Keep candidate visibility, creation eligibility, and row creation separate.

playbooks.heading: If Touching Replay/Profit
playbooks.summary: Replay readbacks, policy, proof predicates, and profit-cycle state have separate owners.

playbooks.heading: If Touching DB/Repositories
playbooks.summary: Preserve tracked-position Postgres ownership and suggested-trade SQLite separation.

playbooks.heading: If Touching Frontend
playbooks.summary: Use typed IDs and focused workflow components before changing Trading Desk or Strategy Lab surfaces.

playbooks.heading: If Touching Generated Artifacts
playbooks.summary: Run the owner generator and keep generated artifacts deterministic and checked.

playbooks.heading: If Touching AI Commodity
playbooks.summary: Treat AI commodity as a separate non-browser proof-first lane.

playbooks.heading: Final Closure
playbooks.summary: Use this path to prove the 44-point remediation loop is closed without treating closure as runtime behavior.

scope: Orientation metadata for regular supervised options browser product work and the separate AI commodity proof lane. It helps agents choose owner docs and code paths.
